storyContext.i_want: A neon-styled chat interface with monospace fonts
storyContext.so_that: The chat feels authentic to my terminal environment

doc.title: Z3roCom Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: Terminal-style input with `/` command system for widget deployment; Socket.IO integration for instant messaging and widget updates.

doc.title: UX Design
doc.snippet: Visual widget menu appears when users type `/`; terminal/hacker theme with neon colors and monospace fonts; keyboard navigation required.

doc.title: Epic & Story Breakdown
doc.snippet: Chat interface uses neon green (#00ff41) on black (#000000); JetBrains Mono or Fira Code fonts; terminal-style cursor and HH:MM:SS timestamps.

code.note: No specific source modules located under project src paths matching this story's keywords. Check client/src and server/src for components named TerminalInput or WidgetMenu.
code.hint: Detected empty package.json files at project root subfolders; confirm dependency manifests if implementation will require new packages.

dependencies.note: No dependency information found in client/package.json or server/package.json (files are empty).

tests.standards: None discovered in repository; recommend unit tests for TerminalInputComponent and integration/e2e for widget flow.
tests.locations: Recommended tests directory: tests/ or client/tests/

constraints.constraint: Follow architecture guidance in docs/architecture.md for component placement and Socket.IO integration.
Maintain accessibility: focus management, keyboard navigation, screen-reader labels.
